nasb.text: This is the law for the one with a discharge, and for the man who has a seminal emission so that he is unclean by it,

esv.text: This is the law for him who has a discharge and for him who has an emission of semen, becoming unclean thereby;

cnv.text: 以上是關於因為異常排泄和遺精，成為不潔淨，

ccb.text: 以上是为患漏症的人，包括遗精、
